title: AB Epic Mod
description:
Hello! I wanted to make an angry birds epic game in minecraft!

NOTE! THAT SOME MODELS ARE TAKEN FROM OTHER PEOPLE, AND I DON'T DENY THAT I TOOK THEIR MODEL!
body:
# **required [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) to launch the mod**
# **_NOTE! THAT SOME MODELS ARE TAKEN FROM OTHER PEOPLE, AND I DON'T DENY THAT I TOOK THEIR MODEL!_**




Hello! I wanted to make an angry birds epic game in minecraft, look what happened and I'll make an update.

Adds angry birds stuff to Minecraft!
The Angry Birds universe and everything else from this mod is owned by Rovio.

Thanks for some textures for the mod : [EnderPerston](https://modrinth.com/user/EnderPreston)
Someone who helped with the mods: [Plazma](https://modrinth.com/user/Plazma)
